channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Congo's health ministry said the deaths were recorded out of…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Congo's health ministry said the deaths were recorded out of the 2,344 cases confirmed as of Saturday. Thirty-seven new deaths were recorded in the previous 24 hours in one of the highest totals. n.pr/4aYrznN
item.content:encoded: Congo's health ministry said the deaths were recorded out of the 2,344 cases confirmed as of Saturday. Thirty-seven new deaths were recorded in the previous 24 hours in one of the highest totals. n.pr/4aYrznN

item.title: In a transition of power presided over by King Charles, Andy…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In a transition of power presided over by King Charles, Andy Burnham is replacing Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. Both are from the center-left Labour Party. n.pr/4fkQ2ov
item.content:encoded: In a transition of power presided over by King Charles, Andy Burnham is replacing Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. Both are from the center-left Labour Party. n.pr/4fkQ2ov

item.title: The U.S. attacks were the ninth consecutive day of bombing s…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. attacks were the ninth consecutive day of bombing since peace talks between the two countries collapsed in dispute over a memorandum of understanding focused on the Strait of Hormuz. n.pr/4priHgk
item.content:encoded: The U.S. attacks were the ninth consecutive day of bombing since peace talks between the two countries collapsed in dispute over a memorandum of understanding focused on the Strait of Hormuz. n.pr/4priHgk

item.title: A clinical psychologist shares effective strategies to quick…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A clinical psychologist shares effective strategies to quickly de-escalate stress and anxiety. That includes dunking your head into a bowl of ice water to trigger your mammalian dive reflex. n.pr/45c38zP
item.content:encoded: A clinical psychologist shares effective strategies to quickly de-escalate stress and anxiety. That includes dunking your head into a bowl of ice water to trigger your mammalian dive reflex. n.pr/45c38zP

item.title: Complex computer systems that decide whether people get Medi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Complex computer systems that decide whether people get Medicaid benefits have a history of errors. Now changes to comply with Trump's tax and domestic policy law are inundating those systems. n.pr/4wXta5T
item.content:encoded: Complex computer systems that decide whether people get Medicaid benefits have a history of errors. Now changes to comply with Trump's tax and domestic policy law are inundating those systems. n.pr/4wXta5T

item.title: While some chase bigger labels or quicker routes to success,…
item.author: NME (@nme.com)
item.description:
While some chase bigger labels or quicker routes to success, Kamal. goes the other way. With his hushed croon and pensive lyricism, he has created a world for his contemplative music to reflect on heartbreak, anxiety and isolation.

Read Kamal.’s #NMETheCover story: www.nme.com/the-cover/ka...
item.content:encoded:
While some chase bigger labels or quicker routes to success, Kamal. goes the other way. With his hushed croon and pensive lyricism, he has created a world for his contemplative music to reflect on heartbreak, anxiety and isolation.

Read Kamal.’s #NMETheCover story: www.nme.com/the-cover/ka...

https://natalie.mu/music/news/681564?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

item.title: We finally find Aemond. Meanwhile, Alicent and Helaena are d…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: We finally find Aemond. Meanwhile, Alicent and Helaena are doing a little too well trying not to be found. n.pr/4vChRPq
item.content:encoded: We finally find Aemond. Meanwhile, Alicent and Helaena are doing a little too well trying not to be found. n.pr/4vChRPq

item.title: Tomahawk, the supergroup led by Faith No More’s Mike Patton,…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Tomahawk, the supergroup led by Faith No More’s Mike Patton, played their first show since 2013 last night.

Their US trek with Melvins is called the A Huge Waste Of Your Time And Money Tour and it runs through mid-August.

Then next year Faith No More will play their first gigs in over a decade.
item.content:encoded:
Tomahawk, the supergroup led by Faith No More’s Mike Patton, played their first show since 2013 last night.

Their US trek with Melvins is called the A Huge Waste Of Your Time And Money Tour and it runs through mid-August.

Then next year Faith No More will play their first gigs in over a decade.

item.title: For Cocanha, singing in Occitan is both a political choice a…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: For Cocanha, singing in Occitan is both a political choice and a link to generations past. On Flame Folclóre, tradition becomes a tool for resistance, collaboration, and community.
item.content:encoded: For Cocanha, singing in Occitan is both a political choice and a link to generations past. On Flame Folclóre, tradition becomes a tool for resistance, collaboration, and community.

item.title: Just in: Spain's run to the title was a defensive mastercla…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Just in:

Spain's run to the title was a defensive masterclass, with wins over four of the world's top ten teams. They are the first World Cup champion to win the title while only conceding a single goal.
item.content:encoded:
Just in:

Spain's run to the title was a defensive masterclass, with wins over four of the world's top ten teams. They are the first World Cup champion to win the title while only conceding a single goal.

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup that included Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Burna Boy felt a little more political than it might have otherwise. n.pr/4vzeCrT
item.content:encoded: With President Trump in attendance, an all-superstar lineup that included Madonna, BTS, Justin Bieber and Burna Boy felt a little more political than it might have otherwise. n.pr/4vzeCrT

item.title: Morton Feldman brought the syntax of the future to the vocab…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Morton Feldman brought the syntax of the future to the vocabulary of the past, creating music that feels both radically experimental and deeply classical.
item.content:encoded: Morton Feldman brought the syntax of the future to the vocabulary of the past, creating music that feels both radically experimental and deeply classical.

item.title: Update: Two U.S. service members were killed in action whil…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Update:

Two U.S. service members were killed in action while "partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks," U.S. Central Command said Saturday.
item.content:encoded:
Update:

Two U.S. service members were killed in action while "partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks," U.S. Central Command said Saturday.

item.title: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices. Sunday's final between Argentina and Spain — the first meeting of their transcendent stars — is here and seems destined to be a classic.
item.content:encoded: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices. Sunday's final between Argentina and Spain — the first meeting of their transcendent stars — is here and seems destined to be a classic.

item.title: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked so…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?
item.content:encoded: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans?

item.title: We saw Jessie Reyez, @nojoy.bsky.social, @kesharose.bsky.soc…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
We saw Jessie Reyez, @nojoy.bsky.social, @kesharose.bsky.social, and more at Festival d'été de Québec, an enjoyable (and affordable) unicorn in North America's crowded festival landscape

👉 stereogum.com/2505733/fest...

[📷: Dylan Page, Marion Desjardins, Stéphane Bourgeois, Sebastien Dion]
item.content:encoded:
We saw Jessie Reyez, @nojoy.bsky.social, @kesharose.bsky.social, and more at Festival d'été de Québec, an enjoyable (and affordable) unicorn in North America's crowded festival landscape

👉 stereogum.com/2505733/fest...

[📷: Dylan Page, Marion Desjardins, Stéphane Bourgeois, Sebastien Dion]
